luma_intro.speaker: Judge Luma
lines: This court records what you do. It rarely records why.
Auticity keeps old prototype lanterns in its basements and newer hospital receipts in its gutters.
SRMT prefers towns that explain themselves into knots.

luma_after_battle.speaker: Judge Luma
lines: The record will show restraint.
The hospital lights are much stranger than my lantern.
If Shrububu wants KFC, she should hurry before the festival vendors invent a pun-based substitute.

pun_loop.speaker: Auticity Resident
lines: Welcome to Auticity. The streets are pun-der construction.
Shrububu asks for KFC and receives only recursive wordplay.
The hospital is down the road. It has excellent patience and terrible patients.

hospital_records.speaker: Hospital Terminal
lines: Pattern Serum intake is up. Doctor Sushan recommends repeat appointments.
The serum narrows behavior loops until residents keep returning for treatment.
Billing note: SRMT favors quiet towns, profitable symptoms, and paperwork that glows.
Shrububu files this under extremely suspicious hospital nonsense.

sushan_intro.speaker: Doctor Sushan
lines: You should not be in the Pattern Serum lab.
Auticity runs smoothly when everyone follows the same loop.
One injection, Shrububu, and you will stop interrupting my revenue model and my festival plans.

sushan_defeat.speaker: Doctor Sushan
lines: The Pattern Serum failed on you.
Fireworks? In my hospital?
Mitta will hear about this before the Aeon Festival lights finish warming up, and SRMT will hate the noise.

aeon_festival.speaker: Festival Host
lines: The Aeon Festival begins because Auticity can finally choose its own rhythm.
Shrububu stands under fireworks that spell something almost like KFC.
Mitta is smiling too hard from the stage.

mitta_intro.speaker: Mitta
lines: Doctor Sushan was mine, and you broke his perfect little system.
This Aeon Festival was supposed to be our victory lap.
Outshine me if you can, Shrububu. SRMT's stage lights are watching.

mitta_defeat.speaker: Mitta
lines: Fine. You outshone the stage, the serum, and my entire festival budget.
Auticity is free, and you are enormous enough to worry the sky.
Area 111 is where SRMT keeps the ugliest pink secrets and, rumor says, the real KFC.

pun_vendor.speaker: Pun Vendor
lines: I sell wordplay by the syllable and soup by mistake.
No KFC, but I can offer a bucket of consonants.
Please do not tell Doctor Sushan that my punchlines are improving.

clinic_receptionist.speaker: Clinic Receptionist
lines: Appointments repeat every thirteen minutes, whether anyone booked them or not.
Doctor Sushan says repetition is wellness.
The waiting room says SRMT's name when the lights flicker.

festival_drummer.speaker: Festival Drummer
lines: I used to drum on schedule. Now I drum when the plaza feels nervous.
That is usually whenever Shrububu mentions KFC.
Mitta hates unscripted rhythm more than rain hates paper.

neon_patient.speaker: Neon Patient
lines: The Pattern Serum made my days fold into little boxes.
After Sushan fell, I unfolded Wednesday and found three jokes I never chose to tell.
That feels like freedom, or at least like a hallway with an exit sign.

aeon_mask_maker.speaker: Aeon Mask Maker
lines: I made masks for the festival, but after Mitta fell they started making faces back.
One mask asked for KFC.
I told it to get in line behind Shrububu.

clue_serum_ledger.speaker: Serum Ledger
lines: The ledger lists repeat injections, repeat invoices, and repeat excuses.
A red stamp reads: 'Approved under SRMT Civic Quiet Initiative.'

clue_aeon_flyer.speaker: Aeon Flyer
lines: The flyer promises lights, music, and 'mandatory spontaneous joy.'
Someone scribbled: 'If Shrububu asks for KFC, stall until Mitta arrives.'

clue_hospital_map.speaker: Hospital Map
lines: The map marks the lobby, the Pattern Serum lab, and a supply closet labeled 'fireworks for failed injection contingency.'
It also points toward Area 111 with a sticky note: 'SRMT wants results by midnight.'

auticity_post_clear_plaza.speaker: Festival Plaza
lines: After Mitta falls, the plaza lights stop blinking in command patterns.
They blink badly drawn chicken buckets instead.

auticity_post_clear_resident.speaker: Auticity Resident
lines: The puns are still terrible, but now they arrive by choice.
Area 111 is ahead, Shrububu. SRMT is out of administrators and almost out of places to hide the KFC.
